feature_name: Suspend Betting Markets on Red Card

scenarios.title: Suspend markets upon direct red card
scenarios.rationale: Ensures no further bets can be placed on markets post-red card, preventing financial loss.

scenarios.title: Suspend markets upon second yellow card resulting in red card
scenarios.rationale: Ensures second yellow cards leading to red cards are handled the same way to avoid market exposure.

scenarios.title: Check suspension timing after red card event
scenarios.rationale: Verifies that markets are suspended within seconds of red card event to mitigate financial risks.

scenarios.title: No suspension of unrelated markets
scenarios.rationale: Ensures that only markets related to the player are suspended, preserving valid betting opportunities.

scenarios.title: Verify suspension for combined markets with multiple players
scenarios.rationale: Ensures that markets with the player as one of many selections are appropriately suspended.

scenarios.title: No suspension if red card received after match termination
scenarios.rationale: Validates that no suspension occurs if a red card is issued post-match.

scenarios.title: Testing suspension just before and after the red card incident
scenarios.rationale: Verifies exact timing of trade suspension to ensure adherence to near-real-time expectations.

open_questions: What exact time frame is considered 'near-real-time' for suspending markets after a red card?
How will the system identify related markets if multiple players are involved and there are numerous betting markets?
Is there a specific obligation to inform users when markets are suspended, or is this strictly a backend process?
entry_criteria: Red card event is received from upstream match events feed.
Markets related to the player are currently open.
exit_criteria: All relevant markets must be suspended immediately upon red card receipt.
Verify that the system logs the suspension action for auditing purposes.
